text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for being here, everyone!<n>Here's one last
song!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Please enjoy.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Wait, it's Silence Suzuka! Gosh,<n>she's so pretty!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
What's she doing in a concert,<n>though? A winning
concert I could<n>understand, but this?

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, this looks fun! We have time,<n>why don't we
watch?

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text: ...I'm good. Concerts are for star<n>runners.

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
Watching is only gonna remind us<n>that with our
records, we'll never get<n>to sing.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: That's wrong!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: This is us asking everyone to joinus for a concert where we can allexpress our gratitude!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
As runners, we aspire to be in<n>concerts. Because
most of the time, a<n>concert means a winning
concert.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
We have to win an intense race for<n>the right to
stand in the spotlight.<n>That's why it's so
glamorous... why<n>we dream.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But what about the girls who don't<n>make it to
center stage? They train<n>just as hard as anyone,
day in and<n>day out.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
We all work so hard at singing,<n>dancing, and
training in the hopes of<n>one day performing in front
of our<n>fans.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Don't get me wrong—I love winning<n>concerts!
They're why I set my<n>sights on the stage in the
first place.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: But I think it'd be amazing to havejust one concert at the end of eachyear where everyone can thanktheir fans with their own singing and dancing.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Don't you want to let your fans know<n>how you
feel? Directly, with your own<n>unique voice?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
That's why we're here today—we<n>want you to
join us, and we hope<n>you can hear that in our
singing.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Together, we can bring back the<n>Grand Concert.

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, so do you mind if we stop by? I,<n>um... might
want to sing with them.

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text: N-not like seriously or anything!Ahaha...

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text: ...Just for a little.

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text: Okay!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Error. Yet again, their singing has...
